title: astragalus altimurensis
intro: Astragalus altimurensis is a species of flowering plant in the legume family, Fabaceae, commonly known as the alti-altum milkvetch. It is used in traditional Chinese medicine, valued for its adaptogenic and anti-inflammatory properties. Astragalus altimurensis is believed to have various health benefits, including enhancing immune function, reducing stress, and improving cardiovascular health. It is often prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and may be combined with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine formulas to promote overall well-being.
